transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, I'm Priya from Supreme Petrochemicals.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: I am the lab head, not procurement, but we do buy chemicals

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: What chemicals does your lab use?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Some titanium dioxide, only 50 kg a month

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Not actively, but send info — I'll share with procurement team
